name: usePerformanceObserver
description: Hook that allows you to observe performance entries
examples: const { supported, entries, start, stop } = usePerformanceObserver();

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: The options for the performance observer

source.source: * @param {UsePerformanceObserverOptions} options The options for the performance observer

tokens.name: options
tokens.description: The options for the performance observer

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The function to handle performance entries

source.source: * @param {PerformanceObserverCallback} callback The function to handle performance entries

tokens.name: callback
tokens.description: The function to handle performance entries

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the observer's support status and methods to start and stop the observer

source.source: * @returns {object} An object containing the observer's support status and methods to start and stop the observer
